description: A publish-request body whose `data_period` object carries an unknown field. The `data_period` sub-schema is CLOSED (additionalProperties: false; see acdp-common.schema.json#/$defs/data_period and the openness map in RFC-ACDP-0007 §3.3.1). `data_period` is exactly `start` and `end`. Registries MUST reject the publish at schema validation (RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 1); consumers MUST reject the body at deserialization.

expected.rationale: data_period is a closed two-field wire shape (start, end). It is part of ProducerContent and therefore part of content_hash; an unknown field would silently change the hash preimage. New time-window semantics require an explicit schema bump, not field-level extensibility.
